ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Continued To Nov-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (362 Louisburg Street. S.F.)
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon (Counsel for Paula Bibbs, Personal Representative).

After announcing the sale and the amount of the first overbid, and after receiving no overbids, the Court confirmed the sale of the real property as reported to the Court in the amount of $618,888.00, signing the Order for same in open Court. No additional bond was required.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Larry Thompson; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Tim Kneis.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (362 Louisburg Street. S.F.)
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Continued To Jun-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Jane Gordon appearing for and with Paula Bibbs. Counsel is waiting for a signature on the reappraisal. Court questioned the procedural problems. No publication and hearing date is not on the Notice of Hearing. Counsel argued that publication was done in the conservatorship and the clerk has failed to stamp the date on the Notice of Hearing. Court will shorten time for publication. Matter is continued to 6/5. Counsel to file Notice of Hearing and Proof of Publication.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
